title: old pvp swords
description: Bring back the old pvp blocking mechanic to all crafted swords !
body:
Looking for a mix between old and new pvp ?

with this datapack/mod you can use your sword to block incoming damages like before 1.9 !!!

![sword blocking ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1a9ae6ac8a1c1028b65f4c3522fb083c997ec11.png)

/!\ this datapack/mod does not bring back sword spamming to make sure pvp is not about who is attacking first
